channel.title: Edinburgh on Nandaja
channel.description: Recent content in Edinburgh on Nandaja

item.title: A walk (followed by sleeping on benches) to remember
item.description: I am sitting near a fireplace in the outskirts of Threlkeld, a lake district village. The view from the window is absolutely breathtaking. I can see mist covered farms grazed by sheep, snow clad mountains, winter struck trees, and tiny little stone cottages. I can’t help but contemplate my journey this past couple of weeks around the United Kingdom and Ireland and I can’t control my urge to write about how incredible an adventure it has been.
